cards.afterText: Place The Batman in any space in his zone.
cards.title: Everywhere at once

cards.afterText: If you won the combat, look at your opponent's hand and choose 1 card for them to discard.
cards.title: Vengeance

cards.afterText: If you won the combat, look at your opponent's hand.
cards.title: Study Methods

cards.duringText: You may change the printed value of the opponent's card to its BOOST value. (If a card does not have a BOOST value, it is treated as 0.)
cards.title: Deduce Strategy

cards.afterText: If you won the combat, choose one of the fighters in the combat and move them up to 2 spaces.
cards.title: Skirmish

cards.duringText: For each point of damage the opposing fighter would take, your opponent discards 1 card instead.
cards.title: Something in the way

cards.immediateText: If your opponent is in your zone, cancel all effects on their card.
cards.title: World's Greatest Detective

cards.afterText: Place The Batman in any empty space adjacent to the opposing fighter.
cards.title: Into the Light

cards.afterText: If your opponent is in your zone, draw a card.
cards.title: Nocturnal Animal

cards.duringText: Your opponent discards 1 random card. Add its BOOST value to this card's attack value.
cards.title: Scare Tactics

cards.afterText: If your opponent is in your zone, recover 2 health.
cards.title: Out of the Shadows

cards.basicText: Recover 1 health. Remove Batman from the board. At the start of your next turn, place Batman in any space. (If you played this as your first action, end your turn.)
cards.title: Vanish

cards.basicText: Look at your opponents hand. They may chose to recover 1 point of health. If they do, discard a card from their hand.
cards.title: Detective Work

hero.name: The Batman
hero.specialAbility: If your opponent is in a different zone than you are, add 2 to the value of all of your cards.

sidekick.name: Robin
sidekick.quote: "They think I'm hiding in the shadows...watching…waiting to strike. But I am the shadows." - Bruce Wayne
